svg.text: EVIDENCE & QUALITY JUDGE (runs before any output enters a deliverable)
“Is every claim traced to a source? Is each number defensible? Does it meet the method gate?” → PASS: into deliverable · FAIL: regenerate with critique · no unfounded numbers

svg.text: ① Method-driven — every engagement runs Discover → Design → Deliver → Assure → Handoff → Expand.
② Evidence-based — every recommendation traces to a source; the judge blocks unfounded numbers.
③ Human-led — agents analyze & draft; humans decide. Strategy is a Tier-3 act.
④ Proof-shipping — a strategy isn't done until one real proof of value ships (built with agent1).
⑤ Claude-native — model tiering + skills-as-configuration; reads the org via MCP, writes only to the workspace.
⑥ Built to hand off — outputs are the inputs to agent1, the 1 Suite, and the vertical Launchpads.
